candidates.statement: Operating power shall not exceed 5 W
candidates.acceptance_criterion: Measured total input power under nominal load is < 5 W
candidates.rationale: The intent states a 5 W power ceiling.

candidates.statement: Board outline shall fit within 50 x 50 mm
candidates.acceptance_criterion: Maximum board extent <= 50 mm on each axis
candidates.rationale: The intent states a 50x50 mm size constraint.

candidates.statement: Device shall be powered and enumerate over USB-C
candidates.acceptance_criterion: A USB-C receptacle is present and the device enumerates when connected
candidates.rationale: The intent names USB-C as the interface.
